results.rendered_html:
grahītṛ a. (trī f.) [grah-tṛc iṭo dīrghaḥ]
1 A taker, an accepter; as in guṇagrahītṛ q. v.
2 Perceiver, observant.
3 Debtor.
4 Purchaser.
